ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Increased Bond
Off Calendar Mar-16-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared by zoom for Lynn Green.

Mr. Dobrov stated that his petition is ready, that they will get the bond increased and that he will submit a petition for final distribution. Status on filing of the increased bond is off calendar. Status on close of estate is continued to April 13, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Dobrov is to file his petition by April 6, 2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-16-2021 Continued To Apr-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Continued To Mar-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared by zoom for Lynn Green (Administrator).

Mr. Dobrov stated that they have the bond, that the petition was delayed, but it will be filed shortly as soon as he gets his Client's signature and that it is a petition for final distribution. The Court noted that the bond is less than the amount on the inventory and appraisal. Mr. Dobrov stated that they can increase the bond. Status on close of estate is continued to March 16, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the increased bond is set for March 16, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
